title: TIA Portal Export
description: Export content from Siemens TIA Portal projects (V17-V20)
description_cn: 从西门子 TIA Portal 项目 (V17-V20) 导出内容

indir.title: Input Directory
indir.description: Directory containing TIA Portal project files (.ap17–.ap20, .zap17–.zap20)
indir.description_cn: 包含 TIA Portal 项目文件的目录 (.ap17–.ap20, .zap17–.zap20)

outdir.title: Output Directory
outdir.description: Directory where exported files will be saved

exportMode.title: Export Mode
exportMode.description: Comma-separated list of content types to export, or "all" for everything
exportMode.description_cn: 逗号分隔的导出内容类型列表，或 "all" 导出全部

keepFolderStructure.title: Keep Folder Structure
keepFolderStructure.description: Preserve the original TIA Portal group hierarchy in the output
keepFolderStructure.description_cn: 在输出中保留原始 TIA Portal 组层次结构

maxWorkers.title: Max Parallel Workers
maxWorkers.description: Maximum number of parallel project exports (leave empty for auto)
maxWorkers.description_cn: 并行项目导出的最大数量（留空自动）

projectFilter.title: Project Filter (Regex)
projectFilter.description: Regular expression to filter project names (e.g. "^Line.*" for projects starting with "Line")
projectFilter.description_cn: 用于过滤项目名称的正则表达式（例如 "^Line.*" 匹配以 "Line" 开头的项目）

ladFormat.title: LAD Block Format
ladFormat.description: Export format for LAD (ladder logic) blocks
ladFormat.description_cn: LAD（梯形逻辑）块的导出格式

udtFormat.title: UDT Format
udtFormat.description: Export format for User Defined Types
udtFormat.description_cn: 用户定义类型的导出格式

safetyDbFormat.title: Safety DB Format
safetyDbFormat.description: Export format for Safety Data Blocks
safetyDbFormat.description_cn: 安全数据块的导出格式

safetyUdtFormat.title: Safety UDT Format
safetyUdtFormat.description_cn: 安全 UDT 的导出格式

umacUser.title: UMAC User
umacUser.description: UMAC local user name for password-protected projects
umacUser.description_cn: 用于密码保护项目的 UMAC 本地用户名

umacPassword.title: UMAC Password
umacPassword.description: UMAC local user password for password-protected projects
umacPassword.description_cn: 用于密码保护项目的 UMAC 本地用户密码

portalMode.title: TIA Portal Mode
portalMode.description: Whether to show the TIA Portal user interface during export
portalMode.description_cn: 导出时是否显示 TIA Portal 用户界面

logfile.title: Log File Path
logfile.description: Write detailed logs to this file
logfile.description_cn: 将详细日志写入此文件

loglevel.title: Log Level
loglevel.description: Minimum log level for console and file output
loglevel.description_cn: 控制台和文件输出的最低日志级别
